tasks.notes: 8 new engine tests + 12 new loop tests = 20 new tests (vs required 8)

escalations.issue: No Bash tool available — full test suite cannot be executed by orchestrator. User must run `python3 -m pytest tests/ -q` to verify acceptance criteria.
